USE_METRICS.help: Enable collection and retrieval of internal metrics.
USE_METRICS.label: Use metrics

METRICS_MEMORY_SIZE.help: Size of the internal storage for metrics.
METRICS_MEMORY_SIZE.label: Metrics memory size

METRICS_MEMORY_MAX_RETRIES.help: Maximum number of retries for memory operations.
METRICS_MEMORY_MAX_RETRIES.label: Metrics memory max retries

METRICS_MAX_BLOCKED_REQUESTS.help: Maximum number of blocked requests to store (per worker). Accepts a plain integer or `k`/`m` shorthand (e.g., `1000`, `1k`, `10k`, `1m`).
METRICS_MAX_BLOCKED_REQUESTS.label: Metrics max blocked requests

METRICS_MAX_BLOCKED_REQUESTS_REDIS.help: Maximum number of blocked requests to store in Redis. Accepts a plain integer or `k`/`m` shorthand (e.g., `10000`, `10k`, `100k`, `1m`).
METRICS_MAX_BLOCKED_REQUESTS_REDIS.label: Metrics max blocked requests Redis

METRICS_REDIS_TTL.help: Time-to-live in seconds for metrics keys stored in Redis (default `2592000`, 30 days; `0` keeps keys permanent). Refreshed on every sync so active data never expires; with a `volatile-lru` eviction policy this lets abandoned metrics data become evictable so Redis recovers from maxmemory instead of rejecting writes forever. Accepts a plain integer or `k`/`m` shorthand.
METRICS_REDIS_TTL.label: Metrics Redis TTL

MAX_LRU_HISTORY.help: Caps the per-worker LRU event history: bounds both the LRU slot count and the per-key event-history array length (block trails, auth trails, etc.). Accepts a plain integer or `k`/`m` shorthand (e.g., `1k`, `10k`, `1m`). Caps unbounded growth from high-cardinality sources like spoofed-IP floods.
MAX_LRU_HISTORY.label: Max LRU history

METRICS_SAVE_TO_REDIS.help: Save metrics (counters and tables) to Redis for cluster-wide aggregation.
METRICS_SAVE_TO_REDIS.label: Save metrics to Redis

METRICS_PERSIST_TO_DB.help: Persist blocked-request reports to the database (durable, queryable) by periodically scraping instances. When disabled, reports remain only in the in-memory/Redis stores.
METRICS_PERSIST_TO_DB.label: Persist reports to database

METRICS_RETENTION_DAYS.help: Maximum age (in days) of persisted blocked-request reports before the retention job deletes them.
METRICS_RETENTION_DAYS.label: Reports retention (days)

METRICS_RETENTION_MAX_ROWS.help: Maximum number of persisted blocked-request reports to keep; the retention job deletes the oldest rows beyond this count.
METRICS_RETENTION_MAX_ROWS.label: Reports retention (max rows)
